input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.2.1
            TITLE: all tractive system components must be rated for the maximum tractive system voltage

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.2.1: All Tractive System components must be rated for the maximum Tractive System voltage
EV.5.2.1 All Tractive System components must be rated for the maximum Tractive System voltage

final_answer: All Tractive System components must be rated for the maximum Tractive System voltage
